calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Eason of Eason & Tambornini telephone number 916-438-1819 for Petitioner Stone Street Capital, LLC.
Ricky Fenton in Propria Persona.

Mr. Eason made reference to the contract/second addendum in the second amended petition and stated that Mr. Fenton will receive a sum of $30,000.00. Mr. Fenton confirmed that he is okay with that amount. PETITIONER STONE STREET CAPITAL LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is approved. Mr. Eason is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Continued To May-04-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: Per the agreement of the parties, PETITIONER STONE STREET CAPITAL, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is continued to May 4, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
